---
title: "pedigreekit 子系谱提取教程"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(pedigreekit)
```

## 构造示例系谱数据

```{r}
ped <- data.frame(
  progeny = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F", "G", "H"),
  sire = c("B", "D", "F", "0", "0", "0", "0", "B"),
  dam = c("C", "E", "G", "0", "0", "0", "0", "C"),
  target_id = c("A", "A", "B", NA, NA, NA, NA, NA),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

ped
```

## 1) target 为单个个体

```{r}
sub_single <- extract_sub_pedigree(
  progeny = ped,
  target = "A",
  generation = 1
)

sub_single
```

## 2) target 为向量（例如 target <- col$id）

```{r}
col <- data.frame(id = c("A", "B"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
target <- col$id

sub_vector <- extract_sub_pedigree(
  progeny = ped,
  target = target,
  generation = "All"
)

sub_vector
```

## 3) target 为整列（列名）

当 `target` 传入列名字符串，函数会把该列当作目标个体列。

```{r}
sub_column <- extract_sub_pedigree(
  progeny = ped,
  target = "target_id",
  generation = "All"
)

sub_column
```

## 4) siblings = "All"：加入全同胞 + 半同胞

```{r}
sub_with_siblings <- extract_sub_pedigree(
  progeny = ped,
  target = "A",
  generation = 1,
  siblings = "All"
)

sub_with_siblings
```

## 5) siblings = "Full"：仅加入全同胞（同 sire 且同 dam）

```{r}
sub_with_full_siblings <- extract_sub_pedigree(
  progeny = ped,
  target = "A",
  generation = 1,
  siblings = "Full"
)

sub_with_full_siblings
```

## 6) 文件输入 + 追溯全部代

```{r}
write.table(ped, "ped_extract_demo.txt", row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

sub_file <- extract_sub_pedigree(
  file = "ped_extract_demo.txt",
  sep = " ",
  progeny = "progeny",
  sire = "sire",
  dam = "dam",
  target = "target_id",
  generation = "All",
  siblings = "None"
)

sub_file
```
